problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity may resolve Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
